modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to drop a course after the add/drop deadline

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to figure out if I can still drop my course since the add/drop date has passed. I mean, I really need to know how to petition for a late drop or withdrawal. It’s kinda frustrating because I thought I had more time, but now I’m not sure what my options are. Any help would be awesome!
